---
title: "Test"
author: "Kirk-Mends Attafuah"
date: "2026-01-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(zoo)
library(forcats)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
base_folder_T <- "C:/Users/kirkm/Music/My research works/Engineering/SenseCobot"

eda_data_T <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder_T, "EDA_Empatica_Signals"))
hr_data_T  <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder_T, "HR_Bangle_Signals"))
ecg_data_T <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder_T, "ECG_Shimmer3_Signals"))

```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

# -------------------------------
# Step 1: Define window size
# -------------------------------
window_size <- 10  # seconds

# -------------------------------
# Step 2: Convert timestamps
# -------------------------------
eda_data_1T <- eda_data_T %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
hr_data_1T  <- hr_data_T  %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))

```


```{r}



# Step 1: Copy dataset
ecg_data_2T <- ecg_data_T

# This is the code to test ------------------------------------

# Baseline
baseline_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
  filter(Task == "Baseline") %>%
  mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))

baseline_date <- as.Date(min(baseline_df$Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE))

# Pick non-Baseline tasks
tasks <- setdiff(unique(ecg_data_2T$Task), "Baseline")

task_dfs <- list()

for (t in tasks) {
  task_rows <- sum(ecg_data_2T$Task == t)
  task_start_raw <- ecg_data_2T %>%
    filter(Task == t) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(Timestamp)
  
  if (is.character(task_start_raw)) {
    # Case 1: relative format "MM:SS(.fraction)"
    if (grepl("^\\d{1,2}:\\d{2}(\\.\\d+)?$", task_start_raw)) {
      parts <- strsplit(task_start_raw, ":")[[1]]
      minutes <- as.numeric(parts[1])
      seconds <- as.numeric(parts[2])
      start_time <- as.POSIXct(
        paste(format(baseline_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "00:00:00"),
        tz = "UTC"
      ) + (minutes * 60 + seconds)
      
      task_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
        filter(Task == t) %>%
        mutate(Timestamp = start_time + seq(0, by = 1/sampling_rate, length.out = task_rows))
      
    } else {
      # Case 2: full datetime string
      task_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
        filter(Task == t) %>%
        mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))
    }
    
  } else {
    # Already POSIXct
    task_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
      filter(Task == t) %>%
      mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  }
  
  task_dfs[[t]] <- task_df
}

# Combine Baseline + all tasks
ecg_data_3T <- bind_rows(baseline_df, dplyr::bind_rows(task_dfs))

#----------------------



# # Step 2: Parse Baseline timestamps (already full date + fractional seconds)
# baseline_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
#   filter(Task == "Baseline") %>%
#   mutate(
#     Timestamp = as.POSIXct(
#       Timestamp,
#       format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS",
#       tz = "UTC"
#     )
#   )


# --------------------------------- This is for only Task 2 because the timestamp format is accurate
# # Baseline
# baseline_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
#   filter(Task == "Baseline") %>%
#   mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))
# 
# # Non-baseline tasks: just parse directly
# task_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
#   filter(Task != "Baseline") %>%
#   mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))
# 
# # Combine
# ecg_data_3T <- bind_rows(baseline_df, task_df)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------




# 
# # Step 3: Get baseline date safely
# baseline_date <- as.Date(min(baseline_df$Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE))
# 
# tasks <- unique(ecg_data_2T$Task)
# task_name <- setdiff(tasks, "Baseline")[1]
# 
# # Step 4: Derive Task 5 start time from its first row
# task_rows <- sum(ecg_data_2T$Task == task_name )
# task_start_raw <- ecg_data_2T %>%
#   filter(Task == "Task 1") %>%
#   slice(1) %>%
#   pull(Timestamp)
# 
# # Step 5: Normalize Task start string
# if (is.character(task_start_raw)) {
#   parts <- strsplit(task_start_raw, ":")[[1]]
#   
#   # Interpret "50:12:00" as 00h 50m 12s
#   hours   <- 0
#   minutes <- as.numeric(parts[1])
#   seconds <- as.numeric(parts[2])
#   
#   # Build proper datetime string
#   task_start <- as.POSIXct(
#     paste(
#       format(baseline_date, "%Y-%m-%d"),
#       sprintf("%02d:%02d:%02d", hours, minutes, seconds)
#     ),
#     format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
#     tz = "UTC"
#   )
# } else {
#   task_start <- task_start_raw
# }
# 
# # Step 6: Reconstruct Task 5 timestamps at 512 Hz
# task_df <- ecg_data_2T %>%
#   filter(Task == task_name) %>%
#   mutate(
#     Timestamp = task_start + seq(0, by = 1/512, length.out = task_rows)
#   )
# 
# # Step 7: Final tidy dataset (combine Baseline + Task 5)
# ecg_data_3T <- bind_rows(baseline_df, task_df)

# --- Validation check ---
ecg_data_3T %>%
  group_by(Task) %>%
  summarise(
    min_time = min(Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_time = max(Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE),
    duration = difftime(max_time, min_time, units = "mins"),
    n_windows = n_distinct(
      floor(as.numeric(difftime(Timestamp, min(Timestamp), units = "secs")) / 10)
    )
  )

```


```{r}
# -------------------------------
# Step 3: Add window IDs
# -------------------------------
add_window_id <- function(df, window_size) {
  df %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task) %>%
    mutate(
      rel_time = as.numeric(difftime(Timestamp, min(Timestamp), units = "secs")),
      window_id = floor(rel_time / window_size)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}

eda_data_1T <- add_window_id(eda_data_T, window_size)
hr_data_1T  <- add_window_id(hr_data_T, window_size)
ecg_data_1T <- add_window_id(ecg_data_3T, window_size)

# -------------------------------
# Step 4: Aggregate features per window
# -------------------------------

# EDA features
eda_task_T <- eda_data_1T %>%
  group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
  summarise(
    EDA_median   = median(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
    EDA_mean     = mean(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
    EDA_sd       = sd(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
    ACC_vm_mean  = mean(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
    ACC_vm_sd    = sd(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
    HR_median    = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
    TEMP_median  = median(TEMP, na.rm = TRUE),
    SCR_count    = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_count,
    SCR_mean_amp = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_mean_amp,
    Label          = first(Label),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# HR features
hr_task_T <- hr_data_1T %>%
  group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
  summarise(
    HR_bangle_median = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
    HR_conf_mean     = mean(Confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    Label              = first(Label),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ECG features
ecg_task_T <- ecg_data_1T %>%
  group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
  summarise(
    RMSSD_ECG = {
      cols <- c("ECG LL-RA CAL","ECG LA-RA CAL","ECG Vx-RL CAL")
      col_present <- cols[cols %in% names(cur_data_all())]
      if (length(col_present) == 0) NA_real_
      else {
        sig <- unlist(cur_data_all()[, col_present[1]])
        compute_rmssd_from_ecg(sig, sampling_rate = 250)
      }
    },
    Label = first(Label),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -------------------------------
# Step 5: Merge all features
# -------------------------------
all_features_T <- eda_task_T %>%
  full_join(hr_task_T,  by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id", "Label")) %>%
  full_join(ecg_task_T, by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id", "Label"))

#colnames(all_features_T)
```



CONTINUE FROM HERE

```{r}
library(dplyr)

all_features_2T <- all_features_T %>%
  group_by(Participant, Task) %>%
  mutate(
    Label = ifelse(Task == "Baseline", NA, first(na.omit(Label)))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

unique(all_features_T$Task)
#View(all_features_2)

 #sum(is.na(all_features_2$Label))
```


```{r}
#Training data, vs Test Data

# Step 1: Baseline subset
baseline_task_2T <- all_features_2T %>%
  filter(Task == "Baseline")
    # Inspect
#print(baseline_rows)


# Step 2: Join baseline to task rows (only once!)
glm_data_norm_2T <- all_features_2T %>%
  filter(Task != "Baseline") %>%
  left_join(baseline_task_2T %>% select(-Task),
            by = c("Participant", "window_id"),
            suffix = c("", "_baseline"))

# Step 3: Subtract baseline values
glm_data_norm_2T <- glm_data_norm_2T %>%
  mutate(
    EDA_mean_delta    = EDA_mean    - EDA_mean_baseline,
    EDA_median_delta  = EDA_median  - EDA_median_baseline,
    EDA_sd_delta      = EDA_sd      - EDA_sd_baseline,
    SCR_count_delta   = SCR_count   - SCR_count_baseline,
    SCR_amp_delta     = SCR_mean_amp - SCR_mean_amp_baseline,
    HR_median_delta   = HR_median   - HR_median_baseline,
    TEMP_median_delta = TEMP_median - TEMP_median_baseline,
    ACC_vm_mean_delta = ACC_vm_mean - ACC_vm_mean_baseline,
    ACC_vm_sd_delta   = ACC_vm_sd   - ACC_vm_sd_baseline,
    HR_bangle_delta   = HR_bangle_median - HR_bangle_median_baseline,
    HR_conf_delta     = HR_conf_mean - HR_conf_mean_baseline,
    RMSSD_ECG_delta   = RMSSD_ECG   - RMSSD_ECG_baseline
  ) 

# Step 4: Testing data prep
glm_model_data_2T <- glm_data_norm_2T %>%
  select(Label, ends_with("_delta"))

glm_model_data_interp_2T <- glm_model_data_2T %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_delta"), ~ zoo::na.approx(.x, na.rm = FALSE))) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_delta"),
                ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Label))

# Fix Label factor levels
glm_model_data_interp_2T$Label <- forcats::fct_recode(glm_model_data_interp_2T$Label,
                                                     NOSTRESS = "NO-STRESS",
                                                     STRESS   = "STRESS")
```

```{r}
new_data <- glm_model_data_interp_2T %>% select(-Label)

# Predict with trained Random Forest
pred_probs <- predict(model_rf_2, new_data, type = "prob")
pred_class <- predict(model_rf_2, new_data)

head(pred_probs)
head(pred_class)
```



Prediction

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(zoo)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

predict_stress_from_folder <- function(base_folder, model_rf, window_size = 10, sampling_rate = 512) {
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Load raw data
  # -------------------------------
  eda_data <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "EDA_Empatica_Signals"))
  hr_data  <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "HR_Bangle_Signals"))
  ecg_data <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "ECG_Shimmer3_Signals"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Convert timestamps
  # -------------------------------
  eda_data <- eda_data %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  hr_data  <- hr_data  %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Handle ECG timestamps
  # -------------------------------
  ecg_data_mod <- ecg_data
  
  # Baseline
  baseline_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
    filter(Task == "Baseline") %>%
    mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))
  
  baseline_date <- as.Date(min(baseline_df$Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  # Pick first non-Baseline task
  tasks <- unique(ecg_data_mod$Task)
  task_name <- setdiff(tasks, "Baseline")[1]
  
  task_rows <- sum(ecg_data_mod$Task == task_name)
  task_start_raw <- ecg_data_mod %>%
    filter(Task == task_name) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(Timestamp)
  
  if (is.character(task_start_raw)) {
    parts <- strsplit(task_start_raw, ":")[[1]]
    hours   <- 0
    minutes <- as.numeric(parts[1])
    seconds <- as.numeric(parts[2])
    task_start <- as.POSIXct(
      paste(format(baseline_date, "%Y-%m-%d"),
            sprintf("%02d:%02d:%02d", hours, minutes, seconds)),
      format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S",
      tz = "UTC"
    )
  } else {
    task_start <- task_start_raw
  }
  
  task_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
    filter(Task == task_name) %>%
    mutate(Timestamp = task_start + seq(0, by = 1/sampling_rate, length.out = task_rows))
  
  ecg_data_final <- bind_rows(baseline_df, task_df)
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Add window IDs
  # -------------------------------
  add_window_id <- function(df, window_size) {
    df %>%
      group_by(Participant, Task) %>%
      mutate(
        rel_time = as.numeric(difftime(Timestamp, min(Timestamp), units = "secs")),
        window_id = floor(rel_time / window_size)
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
  }
  
  eda_data <- add_window_id(eda_data, window_size)
  hr_data  <- add_window_id(hr_data, window_size)
  ecg_data <- add_window_id(ecg_data_final, window_size)
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Aggregate features per window
  # -------------------------------
  eda_task <- eda_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      EDA_median   = median(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      EDA_mean     = mean(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      EDA_sd       = sd(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      ACC_vm_mean  = mean(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
      ACC_vm_sd    = sd(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
      HR_median    = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
      TEMP_median  = median(TEMP, na.rm = TRUE),
      SCR_count    = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_count,
      SCR_mean_amp = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_mean_amp,
      Label        = first(Label),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  hr_task <- hr_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      HR_bangle_median = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
      HR_conf_mean     = mean(Confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
      Label            = first(Label),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  ecg_task <- ecg_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      RMSSD_ECG = {
        cols <- c("ECG LL-RA CAL","ECG LA-RA CAL","ECG Vx-RL CAL")
        col_present <- cols[cols %in% names(cur_data_all())]
        if (length(col_present) == 0) NA_real_
        else {
          sig <- unlist(cur_data_all()[, col_present[1]])
          compute_rmssd_from_ecg(sig, sampling_rate = 250)
        }
      },
      Label = first(Label),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Merge all features
  # -------------------------------
  all_features <- eda_task %>%
    full_join(hr_task,  by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id", "Label")) %>%
    full_join(ecg_task, by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id", "Label"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Baseline subtraction
  # -------------------------------
  all_features <- all_features %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task) %>%
    mutate(Label = ifelse(Task == "Baseline", NA, first(na.omit(Label)))) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  baseline_task <- all_features %>% filter(Task == "Baseline")
  
  glm_data_norm <- all_features %>%
    filter(Task != "Baseline") %>%
    left_join(baseline_task %>% select(-Task),
              by = c("Participant", "window_id"),
              suffix = c("", "_baseline")) %>%
    mutate(
      EDA_mean_delta    = EDA_mean    - EDA_mean_baseline,
      EDA_median_delta  = EDA_median  - EDA_median_baseline,
      EDA_sd_delta      = EDA_sd      - EDA_sd_baseline,
      SCR_count_delta   = SCR_count   - SCR_count_baseline,
      SCR_amp_delta     = SCR_mean_amp - SCR_mean_amp_baseline,
      HR_median_delta   = HR_median   - HR_median_baseline,
      TEMP_median_delta = TEMP_median - TEMP_median_baseline,
      ACC_vm_mean_delta = ACC_vm_mean - ACC_vm_mean_baseline,
      ACC_vm_sd_delta   = ACC_vm_sd   - ACC_vm_sd_baseline,
      HR_bangle_delta   = HR_bangle_median - HR_bangle_median_baseline,
      HR_conf_delta     = HR_conf_mean - HR_conf_mean_baseline,
      RMSSD_ECG_delta   = RMSSD_ECG   - RMSSD_ECG_baseline
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Prepare prediction dataset
  # -------------------------------
  glm_model_data <- glm_data_norm %>%
    select(Label, ends_with("_delta")) %>%
    mutate(across(ends_with("_delta"), ~ zoo::na.approx(.x, na.rm = FALSE))) %>%
    mutate(across(ends_with("_delta"), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Label))
  
  glm_model_data$Label <- forcats::fct_recode(glm_model_data$Label,
                                              NOSTRESS = "NO-STRESS",
                                              STRESS   = "STRESS")
  
  new_data <- glm_model_data %>% select(-Label)
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Predict
  # -------------------------------
  pred_probs <- predict(model_rf, new_data, type = "prob")
  pred_class <- predict(model_rf, new_data)
  
  list(
    features = new_data,
    probabilities = pred_probs,
    classes = pred_class
  )
}

```



```{r}
base_folder_T <- "C:/Users/kirkm/Music/My research works/Engineering/SenseCobot"
results <- predict_stress_from_folder(base_folder_T, model_rf_2)
head(results$classes)
head(results$probabilities)

```


Prediction Wthout the Lable features captured - FINAL CODE
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(zoo)
library(lubridate)

predict_stress_from_folder <- function(base_folder, model_rf, window_size = 10, sampling_rate = 512) {
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Load raw data
  # -------------------------------
  eda_data <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "EDA_Empatica_Signals"))
  hr_data  <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "HR_Bangle_Signals"))
  ecg_data <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "ECG_Shimmer3_Signals"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Convert timestamps
  # -------------------------------
  eda_data <- eda_data %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  hr_data  <- hr_data  %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  
  # -------------------------------
# Handle ECG timestamps
# -------------------------------
ecg_data_mod <- ecg_data

# Baseline
baseline_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
  filter(Task == "Baseline") %>%
  mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))

baseline_date <- as.Date(min(baseline_df$Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE))

# Non-Baseline tasks
tasks <- setdiff(unique(ecg_data_mod$Task), "Baseline")
task_dfs <- list()

for (t in tasks) {
  task_rows <- sum(ecg_data_mod$Task == t)
  task_start_raw <- ecg_data_mod %>%
    filter(Task == t) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(Timestamp)
  
  if (is.character(task_start_raw) && grepl("^\\d{1,2}:\\d{2}(\\.\\d+)?$", task_start_raw)) {
    # Relative format "MM:SS(.fraction)" → reconstruct
    parts <- strsplit(task_start_raw, ":")[[1]]
    minutes <- as.numeric(parts[1])
    seconds <- as.numeric(parts[2])
    start_time <- as.POSIXct(
      paste(format(baseline_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "00:00:00"),
      tz = "UTC"
    ) + (minutes * 60 + seconds)
    
    task_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
      filter(Task == t) %>%
      mutate(Timestamp = start_time + seq(0, by = 1/sampling_rate, length.out = task_rows))
    
  } else {
    # Full datetime string → just parse
    task_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
      filter(Task == t) %>%
      mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))
  }
  
  task_dfs[[t]] <- task_df
}

# Combine Baseline + all tasks
ecg_data_final <- bind_rows(baseline_df, dplyr::bind_rows(task_dfs))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Add window IDs
  # -------------------------------
  add_window_id <- function(df, window_size) {
    df %>%
      group_by(Participant, Task) %>%
      mutate(
        rel_time = as.numeric(difftime(Timestamp, min(Timestamp), units = "secs")),
        window_id = floor(rel_time / window_size)
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
  }
  
  eda_data <- add_window_id(eda_data, window_size)
  hr_data  <- add_window_id(hr_data, window_size)
  ecg_data <- add_window_id(ecg_data_final, window_size)
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Aggregate features per window (no Label)
  # -------------------------------
  eda_task <- eda_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      EDA_median   = median(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      EDA_mean     = mean(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      EDA_sd       = sd(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      ACC_vm_mean  = mean(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
      ACC_vm_sd    = sd(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
      HR_median    = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
      TEMP_median  = median(TEMP, na.rm = TRUE),
      SCR_count    = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_count,
      SCR_mean_amp = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_mean_amp,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  hr_task <- hr_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      HR_bangle_median = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
      HR_conf_mean     = if ("Confidence" %in% names(cur_data())) mean(Confidence, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  ecg_task <- ecg_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      RMSSD_ECG = {
        cols <- c("ECG LL-RA CAL","ECG LA-RA CAL","ECG Vx-RL CAL")
        col_present <- cols[cols %in% names(cur_data_all())]
        if (length(col_present) == 0) NA_real_
        else {
          sig <- unlist(cur_data_all()[, col_present[1]])
          compute_rmssd_from_ecg(sig, sampling_rate = 250)
        }
      },
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Merge all features
  # -------------------------------
  all_features <- eda_task %>%
    full_join(hr_task,  by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id")) %>%
    full_join(ecg_task, by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Baseline subtraction
  # -------------------------------
  baseline_task <- all_features %>% filter(Task == "Baseline")
  
  glm_data_norm <- all_features %>%
    filter(Task != "Baseline") %>%
    left_join(baseline_task %>% select(-Task),
              by = c("Participant", "window_id"),
              suffix = c("", "_baseline")) %>%
    mutate(
      EDA_mean_delta    = EDA_mean    - EDA_mean_baseline,
      EDA_median_delta  = EDA_median  - EDA_median_baseline,
      EDA_sd_delta      = EDA_sd      - EDA_sd_baseline,
      SCR_count_delta   = SCR_count   - SCR_count_baseline,
      SCR_amp_delta     = SCR_mean_amp - SCR_mean_amp_baseline,
      HR_median_delta   = HR_median   - HR_median_baseline,
      TEMP_median_delta = TEMP_median - TEMP_median_baseline,
      ACC_vm_mean_delta = ACC_vm_mean - ACC_vm_mean_baseline,
      ACC_vm_sd_delta   = ACC_vm_sd   - ACC_vm_sd_baseline,
      HR_bangle_delta   = HR_bangle_median - HR_bangle_median_baseline,
      HR_conf_delta     = HR_conf_mean - HR_conf_mean_baseline,
      RMSSD_ECG_delta   = RMSSD_ECG   - RMSSD_ECG_baseline
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Final prediction-ready dataset (no Label)
  # -------------------------------
  new_data <- glm_data_norm %>%
    select(ends_with("_delta")) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ zoo::na.approx(.x, na.rm = FALSE))) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x)))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Predict
  # -------------------------------
  pred_probs <- predict(model_rf, new_data, type = "prob")
  pred_class <- predict(model_rf, new_data)
  
  list(
    features = new_data,
    probabilities = pred_probs,
    classes = pred_class
  )
}

```


```{r}
#base_folder_T <- "C:/Users/kirkm/Music/My research works/Engineering/SenseCobot/Test Folder"
base_folder_T <-  "C:\\Users\\kirkm\\Music\\My research works\\Engineering\\SenseCobot\\Test Folder 2"
results <- predict_stress_from_folder(base_folder_T, model_rf_2)
head(results$classes)
head(results$probabilities)
```


```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(zoo)
library(lubridate)

predict_stress_from_folder <- function(base_folder, model_rf, window_size = 10, sampling_rate = 512) {
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Load raw data
  # -------------------------------
  eda_data <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "EDA_Empatica_Signals"))
  hr_data  <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "HR_Bangle_Signals"))
  ecg_data <- process_folder(file.path(base_folder, "ECG_Shimmer3_Signals"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Convert timestamps
  # -------------------------------
  eda_data <- eda_data %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  hr_data  <- hr_data  %>% mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, tz = "UTC"))
  
  # -------------------------------
# Handle ECG timestamps
# -------------------------------
ecg_data_mod <- ecg_data

# Baseline
baseline_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
  filter(Task == "Baseline") %>%
  mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))

baseline_date <- as.Date(min(baseline_df$Timestamp, na.rm = TRUE))

# Non-Baseline tasks
tasks <- setdiff(unique(ecg_data_mod$Task), "Baseline")
task_dfs <- list()

for (t in tasks) {
  task_rows <- sum(ecg_data_mod$Task == t)
  task_start_raw <- ecg_data_mod %>%
    filter(Task == t) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(Timestamp)
  
  # Try parsing as full datetime first
  parsed <- suppressWarnings(
    as.POSIXct(task_start_raw, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
  )
  
  if (!is.na(parsed)) {
    # Case: full datetime works
    task_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
      filter(Task == t) %>%
      mutate(Timestamp = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC"))
    
  } else {
    # Case: relative string, reconstruct
    parts <- strsplit(task_start_raw, ":")[[1]]
    minutes <- as.numeric(parts[1])
    seconds <- as.numeric(parts[2])
    start_time <- as.POSIXct(
      paste(format(baseline_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "00:00:00"),
      tz = "UTC"
    ) + (minutes * 60 + seconds)
    
    task_df <- ecg_data_mod %>%
      filter(Task == t) %>%
      mutate(Timestamp = start_time + seq(0, by = 1/sampling_rate, length.out = task_rows))
  }
  
  task_dfs[[t]] <- task_df
}


# Combine Baseline + all tasks
ecg_data_final <- bind_rows(baseline_df, dplyr::bind_rows(task_dfs))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Add window IDs
  # -------------------------------
  add_window_id <- function(df, window_size) {
    df %>%
      group_by(Participant, Task) %>%
      mutate(
        rel_time = as.numeric(difftime(Timestamp, min(Timestamp), units = "secs")),
        window_id = floor(rel_time / window_size)
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
  }
  
  eda_data <- add_window_id(eda_data, window_size)
  hr_data  <- add_window_id(hr_data, window_size)
  ecg_data <- add_window_id(ecg_data_final, window_size)
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Aggregate features per window (no Label)
  # -------------------------------
  eda_task <- eda_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      EDA_median   = median(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      EDA_mean     = mean(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      EDA_sd       = sd(EDA, na.rm = TRUE),
      ACC_vm_mean  = mean(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
      ACC_vm_sd    = sd(sqrt(ACC_X^2 + ACC_Y^2 + ACC_Z^2), na.rm = TRUE),
      HR_median    = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
      TEMP_median  = median(TEMP, na.rm = TRUE),
      SCR_count    = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_count,
      SCR_mean_amp = compute_scr_features(EDA)$SCR_mean_amp,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  hr_task <- hr_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      HR_bangle_median = median(HR, na.rm = TRUE),
      HR_conf_mean     = if ("Confidence" %in% names(cur_data())) mean(Confidence, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  ecg_task <- ecg_data %>%
    group_by(Participant, Task, window_id) %>%
    summarise(
      RMSSD_ECG = {
        cols <- c("ECG LL-RA CAL","ECG LA-RA CAL","ECG Vx-RL CAL")
        col_present <- cols[cols %in% names(cur_data_all())]
        if (length(col_present) == 0) NA_real_
        else {
          sig <- unlist(cur_data_all()[, col_present[1]])
          compute_rmssd_from_ecg(sig, sampling_rate = 250)
        }
      },
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Merge all features
  # -------------------------------
  all_features <- eda_task %>%
    full_join(hr_task,  by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id")) %>%
    full_join(ecg_task, by = c("Participant", "Task", "window_id"))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Baseline subtraction
  # -------------------------------
  baseline_task <- all_features %>% filter(Task == "Baseline")
  
  glm_data_norm <- all_features %>%
    filter(Task != "Baseline") %>%
    left_join(baseline_task %>% select(-Task),
              by = c("Participant", "window_id"),
              suffix = c("", "_baseline")) %>%
    mutate(
      EDA_mean_delta    = EDA_mean    - EDA_mean_baseline,
      EDA_median_delta  = EDA_median  - EDA_median_baseline,
      EDA_sd_delta      = EDA_sd      - EDA_sd_baseline,
      SCR_count_delta   = SCR_count   - SCR_count_baseline,
      SCR_amp_delta     = SCR_mean_amp - SCR_mean_amp_baseline,
      HR_median_delta   = HR_median   - HR_median_baseline,
      TEMP_median_delta = TEMP_median - TEMP_median_baseline,
      ACC_vm_mean_delta = ACC_vm_mean - ACC_vm_mean_baseline,
      ACC_vm_sd_delta   = ACC_vm_sd   - ACC_vm_sd_baseline,
      HR_bangle_delta   = HR_bangle_median - HR_bangle_median_baseline,
      HR_conf_delta     = HR_conf_mean - HR_conf_mean_baseline,
      RMSSD_ECG_delta   = RMSSD_ECG   - RMSSD_ECG_baseline
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Final prediction-ready dataset (no Label)
  # -------------------------------
  new_data <- glm_data_norm %>%
    select(ends_with("_delta")) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ zoo::na.approx(.x, na.rm = FALSE))) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x)))
  
  # -------------------------------
  # Predict
  # -------------------------------
  pred_probs <- predict(model_rf, new_data, type = "prob")
  pred_class <- predict(model_rf, new_data)
  
  list(
    features = new_data,
    probabilities = pred_probs,
    classes = pred_class
  )
}

```
